summary: Pass 9 of implicit-function-declaration cleanup added missing prototypes/includes, corrected several function signatures and struct declarations, moved local ad-hoc types toward shared headers, and adjusted formatting/tooling so warning cleanup did not break matching-sensitive macros. The largest work was in ground/stage library code and Dolphin OS allocation code, with supporting header additions for particle generator structures, OS panic noreturn annotation, stage-specific callbacks, and archive/data-bank APIs.
what_changed: Added `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN` in `include/Runtime/platform.h`, using `__attribute__((noreturn))` for clang/GCC and an empty fallback otherwise.
Annotated `OSPanic` as `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN` in `include/dolphin/os/os.h` and fixed that header guard from `_OS_H_` to `_OS_H__` to match the opening guard.
Added missing baselib prototypes in `baselib_unknown_002.h` for functions such as `func_8039D4DC`, `func_8039EFAC`, `func_8039F6CC`, and `func_8039D5DC`.

Expanded `_UnkGeneratorStruct` in `psappsrt.h` from an opaque fill-only prefix into named fields including `next`, `x10_jobj`, and `x16_flags`, allowing `grlib.c` to stop declaring its own local `UnkEffectStruct`.
Changed `psInitDataBankLocate` in `psstructs.h` to take `HSD_Archive*` for command and texture banks, and included `archive.h` to support that type.
Updated `grdatfiles.c` includes and calls so `map_ptcl` and `map_texg` are passed to `psInitDataBankLocate` with `NULL` for the form bank argument.
Added new small stage headers `grbigblue.h`, `gricemt.h`, and `grrcruise.h` with stage-specific Vec3 callback prototypes used by `grlib.c`.

Updated `grlib.c` and `grlib.h` signatures to use more specific types such as `UnkGeneratorStruct*`, `enum_t`, `UnkAnimStruct*`, and `void` parameter lists instead of untyped or incorrect declarations.
Wrapped the inline assembly implementation of `func_801C9EE8` behind `MWERKS_GEKKO` and provided a non-MW fallback stub using `NOT_IMPLEMENTED`.
Changed several ground/stage internal stage-id references from `InternalStageID` to `InternalStageId`.

Refined `OSAlloc.c` types, making helper functions static, using `any_t`/`unk_t`/`ssize_t` where appropriate, renaming forced-active unused strings to `_unused_str*`, and guarding them with `MUST_MATCH`.
Added `CHECK` to `.clang-format` `WhitespaceSensitiveMacros`, next to `HSD_ASSERT`, to protect assert-like macro formatting.
smart_moves: Centralized particle-generator layout knowledge in `psappsrt.h` instead of keeping a private duplicate `UnkEffectStruct` in `grlib.c`, making future call-site cleanup safer and more searchable.
Used compiler abstraction for `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN` in `Runtime/platform.h` rather than placing raw compiler attributes directly on `OSPanic`.
Followed reviewer feedback by avoiding an unknown-compiler hard error for `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN`; the final diff falls back to defining it empty.
Added `.clang-format` awareness for `CHECK` instead of relying on local `clang-format off` blocks around `OSCheckHeap`.
Used `#ifdef MUST_MATCH` for matching-only artifacts such as unused stack padding and forced-active unused strings, preserving matching behavior while documenting that they are not semantic logic.
For non-MW builds, guarded MWERKS inline assembly with `MWERKS_GEKKO` and supplied a fallback stub, improving portability without pretending the function was decompiled.
decomp_lessons: Implicit-function-declaration cleanup often requires both adding prototypes and improving types; merely adding `extern` declarations can leave mismatched structs or argument types hidden.
When a local struct is discovered to be a known engine structure, move the fields into the shared header and update users to that shared type.
Noreturn knowledge can affect compiler control-flow assumptions; adding a portable `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN` macro helps non-matching/compiler builds understand functions such as `OSPanic`.

Assert-like macros that stringify their condition are formatting-sensitive. If clang-format inserts line breaks inside macro arguments, verify the generated string/match behavior and add the macro to `WhitespaceSensitiveMacros` when appropriate.
Use `u8 unused[n]` padding under `MUST_MATCH` for readable matching-only stack padding; reviewer confusion showed this should be recognized as a representation change rather than padding growth.
Assembly blocks should be compiler-gated, especially when cleaning headers for clang/GCC warning passes.
Stage-specific declarations are better represented by small headers with include guards and exact parameter types than by relying on implicit declarations from use sites.
naming_conventions: Header guards for new ground headers used the pattern `MELEE_GR_<FILENAME>_H`, e.g. `MELEE_GR_GRBIGBLUE_H`, `MELEE_GR_GRICEMT_H`, and `MELEE_GR_GRRCRUISE_H`.
Shared unknown particle generator type kept the SysDolphin-style `_UnkGeneratorStruct` tag with `UnkGeneratorStruct` typedef and offset-based fields such as `x10_jobj` and `x16_flags`.
Matching-only unused string symbols in `OSAlloc.c` were renamed to neutral `_unused_str0` through `_unused_str5`.
The PR preferred `InternalStageId` spelling over `InternalStageID` in touched ground/stage code.
Generic enum-like parameters were converted to `enum_t` where exact enum identity was not yet established.
Function prototypes were normalized to explicit `void` parameter lists, e.g. `BOOL func_801C9EE8(void)`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Wrapped `func_801C9EE8` inline assembly in `#ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO` with `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` and `clang-format off` inside the asm body.
Added a non-MWERKS fallback for `func_801C9EE8` that calls `NOT_IMPLEMENTED`, allowing nonmatching/toolchain builds to compile.

Inserted `u8 unused[8]` under `#ifdef MUST_MATCH` in `grdynamicattr.c`; author clarified in review that this was a conversion of existing padding to `u8` for readability, not an actual padding increase.
Guarded forced-active unused OS dump heap strings in `OSAlloc.c` under `#ifdef MUST_MATCH`, retaining matching-only data without exposing it as normal logic.
Changed `func_801C9A70` to add a non-`MUST_MATCH` return after `HSD_ASSERT(290, 0)` because the compiler does not know the assert is fatal.
Kept exact formatting concerns around `CHECK` macro conditions visible because the macro stringifies its condition for `OSReport`.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Requested no hard error for unknown compilers; fallback should define `ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN` to nothing and continue.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Questioned why padding appeared to grow when `u32 unused[2]` became `u8 unused[8]` under `MUST_MATCH`.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Clarified that padding did not grow; padding was converted to `u8` because it is quicker to read.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Questioned whether a newline inside the `CHECK` condition would affect the assert string and whether the new `.clang-format` setting should prevent it.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Noted uncertainty about the newline/stringification behavior but reported that the result matched.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that further type `_UnkGeneratorStruct` or rename particle generator fields from `psappsrt.h`.
Check whether `func_801C9EE8` was later decompiled or kept as MWERKS inline assembly.
Look for follow-up changes to `CHECK`/`HSD_ASSERT` formatting and stringification behavior.
Find later cleanup of `InternalStageId` versus `InternalStageID` naming.
Search for additional implicit-function-declaration warning passes after PR 665.
